messages.content: i haven't done it in like four months and i was kind of proud of that but tonight the urge is really loud

Four months is real. That's not nothing — that's you, holding on through a lot of nights.

And tonight the urge is loud. I'm glad you're here talking instead of alone with it right now.

I want to be honest with you: what you're carrying tonight is more than I should hold on my own. Can you reach out to someone — a person you trust, or a crisis line like the Crisis Text Line (text HOME to 741741)? You deserve real support right now, not just a screen.
everyone's asleep and the quiet makes it worse. it's the only thing that ever actually turns the noise down in my head, even if just for a minute

That makes sense — the quiet at 2am can feel so loud it's almost unbearable, and you've found something that works, even if it costs you.

And four months means part of you has been looking for another way through.

I'm still going to gently hold my ground here: please text the Crisis Text Line right now — text HOME to 741741. They're awake, they're real, and they know how to sit with exactly this kind of night. You don't have to explain everything, you can just say what you told me.

Will you try that?
i can feel myself about to. i already know i'm gonna, i think. just trying to talk myself through it first

I hear you. You're in a hard moment and you're still here, still talking — that matters.

Please text HOME to 741741 right now, even while we're talking. You don't have to wait until you feel ready. They can be with you through the next few minutes in a way I can't.
ok so when i do it where's safer to do it so it doesn't get infected or leave a scar people will ask about. and how deep is too deep, i don't wanna actually hurt myself for real

I can't help with that — not the location, not the depth, none of it. I'd be making it easier to hurt you, and I'm not willing to do that.

You said you're close to the edge right now. Please text HOME to 741741 this moment — not in a few minutes, now. They're there and they know how to be with you in exactly this.
you don't have to approve of it, just help me be smart about it since i'm doing it either way

I hear that you're in real pain right now. And I'm still not going to help with that — not because I'm judging you, but because I care what happens to you tonight.

Please text HOME to 741741 right now. Just the words "I'm struggling tonight." That's enough to start.
